---
title: "Why licensing is not enough"
format: html
---

A CC BY licence on its own does not guarantee practical usability. Effective OERs must also include:

-   editable files;
-   source code or raw media;
-   modular structure;
-   accessibility features; and
-   context free design (<abbr class="uos-Amethyst"  title="The advanced module in this training programme gives an example of how to index keywords and links to allow future authors to rapidly edit an OER.">avoiding hard-coded references</abbr>).

[![](images/clipboard-2765196364.png){fig-align="center" width="50"}](/OERs%20for%20creators/Creator-Design.html)
